{"title": "Think Like a Programmer Before You Code", "description": "Running code that works and understanding why it works are two very different things. Computational thinking — decomposition, pattern recognition, abstraction — is the mental model that separates frustrated beginners from confident programmers. Learn to think first, code second. #Python #DataScience #Shorts", "tags": ["computational thinking", "python for beginners", "learn python", "programming mindset", "data science tutorial", "decomposition programming", "python tutorial"]}
